DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH REQUEST FOR VEHICLE INSPECTION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED, HOWEVER, AS THERE IS A DEARTH OF CASE LAW ADDRESSING VEHICLE INSPECTIONS AND THE CODE PROVIDES ONLY LIMITED GUIDANCE. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANTHONY SCHOENBERG; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-27-17 At 08:00 A.M. In Dept 502

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Request For Vehicle Inspection And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
C. Brian Wagner, of The Bickel Law Firm, Inc., Tel. 619.374.4100, for plaintiffs Spogreev & Smith, appearing via CourtCall;
Jon D. Universal, of Universal & Shannon, LLP, Tel. 916.780.4050, for defendants Mercedes-Benz USA, LLC, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA LLC Motion To Compel Compliance With Request For Vehicle Inspection is GRANTED. If Plaintiffs or their expert were allowed to videotape the inspection and Defendants' expert's laptop screen during the diagnostic examination, or if Plaintiffs' counsel and expert were permitted to ride in the car with Defendants' counsel and expert during the test drive, it potentially could compromise material protected by the attorney work product doctrine. Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is DENIED, however, as there is a dearth of case law addressing vehicle inspections and the Code provides only limited guidance. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-25-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
